title: senecio hieracioides
intro: Senecio hieracioides, also known as Ragwort or Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is commonly found in Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antihelmintic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio hieracioides include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio hieracioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
